subject: Hoi, a small robed alien figure with an otherworldly appearance, surrounded by orange-red flame energy effects
suspected_ip: Hoi (Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon)
description: A small, robed humanoid figure with an alien or non-human physiognomy occupies the center of the composition. The figure wears elaborate purple-blue robes or ceremonial garb. Orange and red flame energy effects surround or emanate from the figure, consistent with the 'Emissary of Flame' designation. The figure's form is compact and the robes are voluminous relative to the body, suggesting a character whose power comes from ceremony and manipulation rather than physical combat. The background picks up the red-orange flame palette, creating a dramatic atmospheric glow. At 624×871 resolution, the overall figure silhouette and robe design are legible.
foreground: small robed alien figure with elaborate purple-blue garb surrounded by orange-red flame energy
emotion: cold scheming presence, composed menace of a manipulator rather than a fighter
